sections.paragraph:
- Original: πάλιν

- Transliteration: Palin

- Phonetic: pal'-in

- Definition:

1. anew, again

a. renewal or repetition of the action

b. again, anew

2. again, i.e. further, moreover

3. in turn, on the other hand

- Origin: probably from the same as G3823 (through the idea of oscillatory repetition)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Probably from the same as G3823 (through the idea of oscillatory repetition); (adverbially) anew that is (of place) back (of time) once more or (conjugationally) furthermore or on the other hand: - again.
